# Nano Signs Canada

Nano Signs is a premium custom printing and signage manufacturer based in Toronto, Ontario. We build long-lasting, high-quality signs, LED display boards, custom neon displays, sidewalk A-frame signs, marketing products, banners, and other corporate promo materials. 

## Contact Info
- **Location**: 2190 Warden Ave, Scarborough, ON M1T 1V6
- **Phone**: +1 416-838-8994
- **Email**: info [at] led-sign.ca
- **Website**: https://led-sign.ca

## Core Products & Services

### 1. LED Display Signs
- **Programmable LED Signs**: Digital message centers, scrolling signs, and full-color electronic display panels.
- **Custom LED Video Walls**: Indoor/outdoor high-definition video arrays, mobile truck billboards, sphere displays, cylinder displays, and stage backdrops.

### 2. Custom Neon Signs
- Bespoke illuminated silicon LED flex displays. Safe, energy-efficient, and long-lasting backdrops for businesses, events, and interior decor.

### 3. Custom Business Signs
- **Channel Letters**: 3D backlit and front-lit storefront signage.
- **Dimensional Lettering**: Acrylic, metal, and foam custom lettering.
- **Sign Panels**: Aluminum, Coroplast, Foam Board, and Acrylic board signage.
- **Sidewalk A-Frame Signs**: Durable, double-sided sidewalk sandwich boards.

### 4. Custom Banners & Flags
- Heavy-duty outdoor vinyl banners, mesh wind-resistant banners, and fabric display banners.
- Retractable rollup banners and custom teardrop/feather promotional flags.

### 5. Decals & Graphics
- Storefront window graphics, frosted privacy films, custom wall graphics, and vehicle sign magnets.

### 6. Marketing & Promo Materials
- Custom business cards, flyers, brochures, custom t-shirts, promotional coffee mugs, canvas tote bags, and corporate pens.
